askQuestion.title: Ask Question
askQuestion.contentPlaceholder: Describe your question in detail (Markdown supported)...
askQuestion.noTopicsSelected: No topics selected, choose from popular topics below or add manually
askQuestion.topicInputPlaceholder: Enter topic name, press Enter to add
askQuestion.topicExists: Topic already exists, please select from popular topics

stats.title: Forum Stats
stats.loginPrompt: Log in to view your forum stats

dashboard.motivation: Keep up the good work today 💪
dashboard.noPlansYet: No study plans yet, go create one!
dashboard.checkInSuccess: Check-in successful! Studied {hours} hours today, keep it up! 🎉
dashboard.motivationNotStarted: Haven't started yet — take the first step!

plan.title: Plan
plan.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this plan?
plan.name: Plan Name

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your avatar, contact details, and account security to keep your study space complete.
profile.basicInfoDesc: Keep your information current so your study plans and interactions show a clearer profile.
profile.passwordDesc: After changing your password, you will need to log in again. Use a safer combination that is still easy to remember.
profile.changeAvatarHint: Click camera icon to change avatar (supports cropping and compression, max 5MB)
profile.pleaseSelectImage: Please select an image file (JPG, PNG, GIF, etc.)
profile.passwordChangeSuccess: Password changed successfully, please login again

chat.subtitle: Exchange learning experiences with classmates
chat.noMessages: No messages yet, be the first to speak!
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message. Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line
chat.enterToSend: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
chat.clearMessagesConfirm: This only clears chat history for the current account on this computer. Server messages and other accounts are not affected.
chat.messagesCleared: Local chat history for this account has been cleared
chat.connectionNotEstablished: Connection not established, please try again later
chat.connectionFailed: Connection failed, please refresh the page
chat.roomIntro: Public discussion and group chats live here.
chat.globalRoomDesc: Good for questions, check-ins, and daily discussion
chat.noGroups: You have not joined a study group yet
chat.noRoomMessages: No messages yet. Send one to start today’s discussion.
chat.clearCurrentMessagesConfirm: This only clears the message list on this page. It does not delete server chat history.
chat.leaveGroupDesc: After leaving, you can keep the synced study plan or delete it together before leaving.
chat.globalRoomSubtitle: Good for questions, encouragement, and study rhythm discussion.
chat.groupRoomSubtitle: This room is linked to your group plan, and discussion stays gathered here.
chat.loginRequired: Please log in before entering the chat room
chat.deletedPlanAndLeft: Deleted study plan and left the group
chat.keptPlanAndLeft: Kept study plan and left the group

errors.network: Network error, please check your connection
errors.server: Server error, please try again later

home.title: Smart Study Planner
home.subtitle: Let AI customize your exclusive study plan, easy check-in, efficient learning
home.aiGenerateDesc: Based on large language models, automatically generate personalized study plans based on your goals and time
home.dailyCheckInDesc: Easily check in to record study progress, view consecutive check-in days, and develop study habits
home.studyStatsDesc: Visualize study data, calendar heatmap, progress tracking at a glance
home.step1Desc: Enter what you want to learn and available time
home.step2Desc: Intelligently generate detailed daily learning tasks

myPlans.title: My Study Plans
myPlans.noPlansDesc: Create your first smart study plan and let AI help you plan your learning path
myPlans.noMatchDesc: Please try adjusting search keywords or filter conditions
myPlans.confirmDeletePlan: Are you sure you want to delete this plan? This action cannot be undone.

createPlan.title: Create Study Plan
createPlan.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Learn Python programming, master basic syntax, data structures and common libraries, able to complete small projects independently
createPlan.goalHint: Describe in detail what you want to learn and the level you expect to achieve
createPlan.planTitlePlaceholder: Leave blank for AI to generate automatically
createPlan.pleaseWait: Please wait, AI is customizing your study plan
createPlan.tip1: The more detailed the goal description, the more accurate the generated plan
createPlan.tip2: Recommended daily study time is 2-4 hours for sustainability
createPlan.tip3: Plans will be automatically saved to your account
createPlan.lead: Enter your goal, duration, and pace. AI will analyze your direction and complete a clearer goal description after you pause typing.
createPlan.basicInfoDesc: After you enter a learning goal, analysis and roadmap preview will appear on the right.
createPlan.acceptGoalSuggestion: Click the light suggestion to accept it, or press Tab
createPlan.goalAutoTip: After you pause typing, AI will complete and improve your description
createPlan.notesPlaceholder: e.g., Prefer project practice, but also cover interview prep
createPlan.generateDesc: After submission, the formal study plan will be saved with the analysis and roadmap on the right.
createPlan.resultDesc: The plan has been generated. Go to My Plans to view daily tasks and stage arrangements.
createPlan.analysisLoading: AI is analyzing your learning goal...
createPlan.analysisEmpty: After you enter a learning goal, AI analysis of core skills, recommended pace, and estimated completion rate will appear here.
createPlan.roadmapEmpty: After you enter a goal and plan duration, AI will preview the roadmap by stage.
createPlan.stageFallback: Stage arrangement generated from the current goal.
createPlan.advisorIntro: I can give suggestions based on your goal draft and help judge whether the plan is too heavy or too light.
createPlan.advisorLoading: Generating advice from the current draft...
createPlan.advisorPlaceholder: e.g., Is this goal too much for 30 days?
createPlan.analysisServiceFailed: AI goal analysis failed. Please check the backend service.
createPlan.roadmapServiceFailed: Learning roadmap generation failed. Please check the backend service.
createPlan.networkError: Network error. Please check the backend service.
createPlan.advisorFallback: I have generated some suggestions from the current draft. You can ask follow-up questions for more detail.
createPlan.advisorUnavailable: The AI advisor cannot answer right now. Please try again later.
createPlan.advisorUnavailableShort: The AI advisor cannot answer right now
createPlan.advisorRequestFailed: AI advisor request failed. Please check the backend service.

planDetail.invalidStudyHours: Please enter study time between 0.1 and 24 hours

aiAssistant.subtitle: Smart Q&A, solve learning doubts
aiAssistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask how to study today, break tasks down, or adjust your plan...
aiAssistant.question1: How to create an efficient study plan?
aiAssistant.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI learning assistant, how can I help you?
aiAssistant.cannotUnderstand: I did not quite understand. Could you rephrase that?
aiAssistant.title: Study Assistant
aiAssistant.noScheduledTask: No scheduled tasks today. Ask the assistant to review or arrange catch-up study.
aiAssistant.noPlansHint: No study plan yet. Create one first so the assistant can understand your daily schedule.
aiAssistant.loadContextFailed: Failed to read your study plan. Please try again later.
aiAssistant.openingWithTasks:
Hi {name}, today is {date}.
You have {count} tasks today:
{tasks}

Would you like me to break them into actionable study steps?
aiAssistant.openingWithPlans:
Hi {name}, today is {date}.
You have {count} active plans, but no scheduled tasks today. Want me to pick a good focus from your current plans?
aiAssistant.openingEmpty:
Hi {name}, today is {date}.
I have not found a study plan yet. You can create one first, or tell me what you want to learn today and I will break it into actionable steps.

questions.breakdown: What tasks do I have today? Can you break each into 3 study steps?
questions.priority: Based on my progress, what should I prioritize today?
questions.compress: If I only have 30 minutes, how should I compress today’s task?
questions.overdue: What tasks did I leave unfinished? Help me arrange catch-up study
questions.planFocus: Help me choose today’s focus from my current plans
questions.adjustment: Does my recent plan progress need adjustment?
questions.review: Design a 30-minute review flow for me

prompt.overdueLine: {index}. Plan {plan}, originally due {date}: {content}; estimated {hours} hours (overdue, unfinished)
